\tzpentry{ID3464}{Curvature Quantum State Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3464 introduces Curvature Quantum State Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \nabla^2 \Psi + f(\text{curvature}) J_6(kr) = 0. \]
